text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ah, training time already, huh... Okaaay,<n>I'll go
get—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Shhh! Quiet! Don't move a muscle...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Stop! Just... close your eyes! Focus all<n>your energy
on listening...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Come on, half-closed eyes aren't<n>gonna cut it.
Geez...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
How am I supposed to run away while<n>you're not
looking? Nyahaha.
